plot.description: Plot object to annotate with y-axis

at.description: A numeric vector of y-value locations for tick marks

label.description: A logical value indicating whether to draw the labels on the tick marks, or an expression or character vector which specify the labels to use

main.description: A logical value indicating whether to draw the y-axis at the left of the plot

scipen.description: An integer indicating the penalty to be applied when deciding to print numeric values in fixed or exponential notation

axisLine.description: A logical value indicating whether to show the axis line

params.description: An optional plotgardener pgParams object containing relevant function parameters
